title: clausena san-ki var. calciphila
intro: Clausena san-ki var. calciphila, also known as the Chinese quinine or kaffir lime, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Clausena san-ki var. calciphila are primarily attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like limonene and beta-pinene, offering antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and treatment of respiratory problems. Clausena san-ki var. calciphila is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which are traditionally used in Asian medicine to address various health concerns.
